response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio consists of English commentary. The original spoken English matches standard transcription. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was empty of lyrics/songs as this is raw gameplay commentary, so full manual transcription was used. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were accurately aligned to the spoken audio, with distinct breaks for speech pauses.
